center.name: Wilhelm Deppe
center.summary: Wilhelm Deppe是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Olivaceous elaenia，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The olivaceous elaenia (Elaenia mesoleuca) is a species of bird in subfamily Elaeniinae of family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Argentina, Brazil, Paraguay, and Uruguay.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The olivaceous elaenia (Elaenia mesoleuca) is a species of bird in subfamily Elaeniinae of family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Argentina, Brazil, Paraguay, and Uruguay.Remsen, J
